client_id.title: Client ID
client_id.api_description: Can be used with auth_method oauth to use custom oauth

client_secret.title: Client Secret
client_secret.api_description: Can be used with auth_method oauth to use custom oauth

oauth_refresh_token.api_description: Can be used with auth_method oauth to use custom oauth

csv_has_headers.title: CSV files have headers
csv_has_headers.description: Whether CSV files have a header row with field names.

is_single_table.title: Files are time-based snapshots
is_single_table.description: Treat the files as a single table.

single_table_file_formats.title: File formats
single_table_file_formats.description: File formats that may be present across different tables

skip_lines.title: Skip first lines
skip_lines.description: Skip first N lines of each CSV file.
